steps.title: Find the antecedent
steps.content: The pronoun refers to the feature-length romance, meaning the film Stellar. Because that antecedent is singular, the blank needs a singular pronoun.

steps.title: Eliminate plural pronouns
steps.content: Choice B is plural and cannot agree with a single film. Choice C is also plural. Choice D is plural as well, so it creates pronoun-antecedent disagreement with the feature-length romance. The answer is A.
